name: StarlightRose
profile_about:
Transfem self taught artist and author who loves to create.  Working on a comic series known as Legends of Nexus, the first act is "A Change of Fates" with multiple short stories planned for "Tales From the Lost".

My fursona is a 3 tailed, heterochromatic arctic and fennec fox hybrid who is also able to turn into a draekon, a special kind of dragon in my comic.
profile_artinfo: My commission info is on https://Ko-Fi.com/starlightroseuwu and I hope you give me the opportunity to draw for you!
